text:
Created attachment 153139
openbsc

OpenBSC is minimalistic implementation of the GSM network,
with particular emphasis on the functionality typically provided 
by the BSC, MSC, HLR, VLR and SMSC.

WWW: http://openbsc.osmocom.org/trac/
